[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A man in a dark suit and black traditional cap holds up a white card with the word “tes” while a dark chart graphic appears behind him.

The main subject is a seated or standing man facing the camera, holding a rectangular white sheet with both hands at chest level. He has a medium complexion, a calm expression, and is wearing a dark suit jacket over a white shirt with a red tie. A small red-and-white pin is visible on his left lapel, and his black cap covers his head. The card he holds is centered in the frame and displays large, bold black lowercase text reading “tes.”

The setting appears to be a studio-style or graphic background with no visible real environment, dominated by a dark interface and a line chart. Behind him there is a horizontal axis with dates labeled “14 Mei,” “23 Mei,” and “1 Jun,” and the line graph is green. In the top-left corner, there is light-colored text and additional small interface text.

Visible text includes: “18.095,70 Rupiah”, “Indonesia”, “6 Jun, 08.19 UTC - Dari Morningstar - Penafian”, “1HR”, “5HR”, “1BLN”, “1TH”, “5TH”, “Maks”, “18.500”, “18.000”, “17.500”, “17.000”, “14 Mei”, “23 Mei”, “1 Jun”, and on the card “tes”.

The image shows a man holding up a white sign with the word “tes” in front of a dark financial chart interface. The background contains a green line graph with date markers and currency information in text.
